title: 你去过北京吗？
description_uz: «O'tgan oy qayerga sayohat qilding?» — do'sting bilan ko'rgan joylar, mehmonxona va taomlar haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog o'tgan vaqt haqida so'rash, narx va davomiylikni aniqlash va keyingi reja tuzishni mashq qiladi. Qiziqarli mavzu va sayohatga oid foydali so'zlar. Takrorlash va gapirishga ishonch hosil qilish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Куда ты ездил в прошлом месяце?» — разговор с другом об увиденных местах, отеле и еде. Этот диалог отрабатывает вопросы о прошлом, уточнение цены и длительности и планирование следующей поездки. Увлекательная тема и полезная лексика для путешествий. Отлично подходит для повторения и уверенности в речи.
description_en: «Where did you travel last month?» — a chat with a friend about the sights, the hotel, and the food. This dialogue practises asking about the past, checking price and length of stay, and planning the next trip. An engaging topic with useful travel vocabulary. Great for repeating and building speaking confidence.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ qù guo Běi jīng ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Qù guo, qù nián xià tiān qù de.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 很不错，好玩的地方很多。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn bú cuò, hǎo wán de dì fāng hěn duō.
sentences.text_translation_en: Really nice, there are lots of fun places.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ qù le nǎ xiē dì fāng?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which places did you go to?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Gù gōng, Tiān ān mén, hái yǒu Cháng chéng.
sentences.text_translation: Gugun saroyi, Tyananmen va Buyuk devor.
sentences.text_translation_en: The Forbidden City, Tiananmen, and the Great Wall.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Is the Great Wall hard to climb?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有一点儿累，但是很值得。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎnr lèi, dàn shì hěn zhí dé.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz charchatadi, lekin juda arziydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного утомительно, но оно того стоит.
sentences.text_translation_en: A bit tiring, but really worth it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men wán le jǐ tiān?
sentences.text_translation_en: How many days did you spend there?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 玩了五天，时间还是不够。
sentences.pinyin: Wán le wǔ tiān, shí jiān hái shì bú gòu.
sentences.text_translation: Besh kun sayr qildik, baribir vaqt yetmadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пять дней, но всё равно времени не хватило.
sentences.text_translation_en: Five days, but it still wasn't enough time.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Běi jīng de dōng xi guì ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 吃饭不贵，酒店有点儿贵。
sentences.pinyin: Chī fàn bú guì, jiǔ diàn yǒu diǎnr guì.
sentences.text_translation: Ovqat qimmat emas, mehmonxona biroz qimmat.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Еда недорогая, а отель немного дорогой.
sentences.text_translation_en: Food isn't expensive, but hotels are a bit pricey.
sentences.speaker: B
